'''Pachwenko''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] of Chief [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit's]] tribe.

==Biography==
A male Jawa, Pachwenko was a member of a tribe of Jawas on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] led by [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit]]. He was called "Patches" by local [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers because of his patchwork robes. As the tribe scavenged the wastes of the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the Jawas came across two droids, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and sold them to the [[Lars family/Legends|Lars family]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] not long after by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who were searching for the droids.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
To some fans, Pachwenko is known as one of the "Freak Giant Jawas," or "Tall Jawas."
